data.content: Resolved all 45 ESLint warnings (max-lines, max-lines-per-function, max-len, no-unused-vars) across 8 UI panel components by extracting sub-components and hooks into ~46 new focused files. All 165 test files pass (2239 tests), zero type errors, zero ESLint warnings in scoped files. Branch: fix/dc62-ui-panel-style, commit: cebce5d52bc7. Contract tests updated to reference new file locations.
